violations.text: Thermometers are lacking or inaccurate in a couple of the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one accurate thermometer in the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

Working containers of dry ingredient (fish flour) is not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
The facility is lacking proper stoppers for the 3-bay sink. Stoppers are to be purchased today for proper sanitizing. Picture to be sent to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
Leak observed at the warewashing handsink. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
